meaning: n.鐙崰,涓撳崠 鍨勬柇
examples: The trend of CATV network will be annexation, monopolization and recombination.
The Fed's influence comes about because of its monopolization of the creation of money.
America has the strictest measures and the richest experience in the world combating monopolization.
Microsoft was so busy fighting government monopolization claims it ignored the Internet and Google came along.
The question for antitrust authorities will be whether Google engaged in anti-competitive practices to extend its monopolization into mobile.
